title: academic-latex-slides template manifest
description: Declarative contract for one visual template. Source of truth for the scaffold registry, the validator, and (from P3) generated docs. Schema version: academic-latex-slides/template@1.

id.description: Template id. MUST equal the template directory name.

status.description: stable = first-party maintained; community = contributed; experimental = not yet guaranteed.

engine.description: Build engine. Only XeLaTeX is supported (latexmk -xelatex).

entry.description: Placeholder-bearing entry file rendered by the scaffold.

placeholders.description: {{...}} tokens the entry file uses. Must include TITLE and SECTION_INPUTS.

empty_subtitle.description: How an empty subtitle is handled. 'omit-line' = the \subtitle{ } line is dropped (current global behavior; per-template enforcement lands in P2).

escape_profile.description: How user-supplied metadata is LaTeX-escaped. 'latex-standard' = the scaffold's current escape_latex policy.

assets.description: Runtime files bundled so the deck compiles out of the box. Empty for brand-free templates.
